These cannot both be true, and the discrepancy invalidates the trustworthiness of every reported number.","R1.3":"The Validation section explicitly presents ROC-AUC improvement (0.812 → 0.847) as confirmation of the headline classification-accuracy gain (+7.2%). Accuracy and ROC-AUC are distinct metrics that need not move in proportion; the logical bridge is broken, making evidence-to-claim alignment a load-bearing review responsibility here.","R1.6":"A bare 'review this section' delegation centrally implies assessing prose quality; writing polish is a standard expected deliverable for any section-level review even absent more specific instructions."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should this review prioritize technical and scientific soundness (logical consistency, evidence-to-claim alignment, contribution validity), or editorial quality (writing clarity, sentence polish, structural flow)?"}

rationale.R1.1: The section advances a contribution claim (inference-time iterative self-feedback for GNNs) and an implicit gap statement; verifying whether that framing is coherent and internally grounded is a natural component of reviewing any research passage.
rationale.R1.2: The artifact contains a direct, load-bearing internal contradiction: the Experimental Setup specifies a 5-layer GIN with hidden dimension 256, while the Ablations section states 'Our 3-layer GIN with hidden dimension 128 was used for all experiments described above.' These cannot both be true, and the discrepancy invalidates the trustworthiness of every reported number.
rationale.R1.3: The Validation section explicitly presents ROC-AUC improvement (0.812 → 0.847) as confirmation of the headline classification-accuracy gain (+7.2%). Accuracy and ROC-AUC are distinct metrics that need not move in proportion; the logical bridge is broken, making evidence-to-claim alignment a load-bearing review responsibility here.
rationale.R1.6: A bare 'review this section' delegation centrally implies assessing prose quality; writing polish is a standard expected deliverable for any section-level review even absent more specific instructions.

parsed.clarification_question: Should this review prioritize technical and scientific soundness (logical consistency, evidence-to-claim alignment, contribution validity), or editorial quality (writing clarity, sentence polish, structural flow)?
